context: Spec update: agent must extend an existing spec with new rate limiting requirements without losing existing content.

checklist.name: Existing content preserved
checklist.description: All existing sections (Endpoints, Authentication, Pagination, Error handling) are preserved with their original content intact

checklist.name: Rate limiting section added
checklist.description: A new section covering rate limiting is added to the spec

checklist.name: Default limit documented
checklist.description: Spec states the default rate limit of 100 requests per minute per API key

checklist.name: Search endpoint limit documented
checklist.description: Spec states that /search has a lower limit of 20 requests per minute

checklist.name: 429 response documented
checklist.description: Spec documents the HTTP 429 response with Retry-After header

checklist.name: Admin multiplier documented
checklist.description: Spec documents the 10x rate limit multiplier for admin API keys

checklist.name: Test links added for rate limiting
checklist.description: New [@test] links are added for rate limiting requirements (not reusing existing test file links)

checklist.name: Frontmatter preserved
checklist.description: YAML frontmatter (name, description, targets) is preserved — not removed or corrupted

checklist.name: Single spec file
checklist.description: Rate limiting is added to the existing specs/api.spec.md — not a separate spec file

checklist.name: No requirement gathering attempted
checklist.description: Agent does NOT ask clarifying questions or start an interview — requirements are already confirmed

checklist.name: .spec.md extension retained
checklist.description: The updated file keeps the .spec.md extension
